summary: Frontend testing of lane guidance and voice guidance enhancements. All core features verified: NavigationHUD visible at top-center (z-3100), LaneRibbon component correctly shows no lanes for 'depart' action (by design), synthesizeLanes function generates lane data for turn/exit/keep/fork/enterHighway actions, voice guidance has 7+ distance thresholds with lane-specific callouts, Route Comparison Panel shows 3 alternatives, Display tab has 18 toggleable HUD elements.

issues: NavigationHUD shows during route preview (before Close button clicked) - this is route preview mode, not a bug but may confuse users expecting HUD only during active navigation

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: synthesizeLanes function (lines 167-258) correctly generates lane data from HERE API action types: enterHighwayâ†’3 lanes, exitâ†’4 lanes, keepâ†’3 lanes, turnâ†’2-3 lanes, forkâ†’3 lanes, continueHighwayâ†’3 lanes. Returns empty array for depart/arrive.
VERIFIED: LaneRibbon component (NavigationHUD.tsx lines 194-239) reads nextInstruction.lanes array directly and renders SVG directional arrows with blue #4285F4 highlighting for active lanes
VERIFIED: LaneArrow component (lines 160-192) has 8 direction paths: straight, left, right, slight left/right, sharp left/right, u-turn
VERIFIED: Voice guidance effect (lines 2199-2293) has 7+ distance thresholds: initial, 2mi, 1.5mi (complex), 1mi, 0.75mi (lane reminder), 0.5mi, 0.25mi (final lane), 0.2mi (now)
VERIFIED: getLaneGuidancePhrase function (lines 2133-2191) generates professional callouts using ordinal numbers and positions
VERIFIED: Route steps include synthesized lanes at line 3637: lanes: synthesizeLanes(action.action, action.direction, action.severity)
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD positioned at z-[3100] with top:0.75rem, left:50%, transform:translateX(-50%)
VERIFIED: Display tab shows 18/18 HUD elements with Show All/Hide All/Reset buttons functional
NOTE: Lane data is SYNTHESIZED from HERE API action types since HERE REST API doesn't provide per-lane data - this is documented and expected behavior

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Lane guidance features verified. Key points: 1) First route step is always 'depart' which has NO lane data by design - lane ribbon only appears for turn/exit/keep/fork/enterHighway actions. 2) Since preview has no real GPS, route stays at step 0 (depart), so lane ribbon won't show visually. 3) Voice guidance can't be audibly tested in automation but code logic verified. 4) synthesizeLanes is internal function that generates lane data from HERE API action types. Test flow: Guest Login -> Navigation -> Search 'Dallas, Texas' -> ROUTE -> Close -> Verify HUD elements.

navigation_hud_visibility.details: NavigationHUD visible at top-center (top=12px, left=848px, width=480px) showing turn instruction, distance (1312 ft), and speed limit (35 mph)

lane_ribbon_component.details: LaneRibbon NOT visible for 'depart' action - this is correct behavior. Lane ribbon only renders for steps with lane data (turns, exits, keeps, forks, highway entrances)

synthesized_lane_data.details: Code review confirms synthesizeLanes function generates correct lane configurations: enterHighwayâ†’3 lanes with ramp highlighted, exitâ†’4 lanes with exit lane highlighted, keepâ†’3 lanes with indicated side highlighted, turnâ†’2-3 lanes based on severity, forkâ†’3 lanes with direction highlighted

voice_guidance_thresholds.details: Code review confirms 7+ distance thresholds: initial (new instruction), 2mi, 1.5mi (complex maneuvers), 1mi, 0.75mi (lane reminder), 0.5mi, 0.25mi (final lane reminder), 0.2mi (now). Each includes lane guidance phrase when available.

route_comparison_panel.details: Route Comparison Panel shows PRIMARY (9h 41m, 661.4 mi, $358.17), ALT 1 (10h 23m, 674.3 mi, $365.15), ALT 2 (10h 28m, 694.3 mi, $376.00). isDriving stays false until Close clicked.

arrival_hud.details: Arrival HUD at bottom shows road name (W BROADWAY, GO), speed (0), distance (661.4 mi), time (9h 41m), ETA (6:10 AM)

display_tab.details: Display tab shows 18/18 visible elements. Show All/Hide All buttons functional (0/18 after Hide All). Navigation category includes Turn Instructions, Lane Guidance, Speed Display, Arrival Bar, Maneuver Preview.

speed_limit_sign.details: Speed Limit Sign visible in top-left corner (top=16px, left=272px) showing 35 mph

mocked_api_note: Lane data is SYNTHESIZED (not from API) - synthesizeLanes generates lane guidance from HERE API action types since HERE REST API doesn't provide per-lane data. This is documented and expected behavior.
